creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170201
patch to update math/ess from 15.09-2 to 16.04

This patch updates math/ess from 15.09-2 to 16.04.

The new port has some nice fixes and features, i.e. editing rmarkdown/knitr files works smoother again.


To disembarass this homeless port, I can take maintainership ;)


Port update is tested on Poudriere (9.3i/a, 10.3a, HEADa) and also 'portlint -AC' seems satisfied.
